violations.detail: Interfaces not in alphabetical order: declared as Closeable, NoPadding, ComponentIcon, Attachable; should be Attachable, Closeable, ComponentIcon, NoPadding
Static Logger field appears after public static final constants (ANIMATION_DURATION, DISTANCE, Z_INDEX); Logger should be the first static final field
Deprecated PopperPopover class Javadoc has no @see link to PatternFly docs (acceptable since deprecated, but noted)
